name: blendersql
description: SQL interface to bpy.data: a comprehensive SQLite virtual-table surface over bpy.data plus typed verbs and escape-hatch SQL functions, for querying and editing scenes, grease pencil, meshes, materials, animation, modifiers, VSE, and assets in a running Blender

interface.shortDescription: Drive Blender over SQL: query and edit bpy.data through virtual tables and verbs
interface.longDescription: Adds a namespaced BlenderSQL skill set for working with a running Blender (GUI add-on, headless CLI, or HTTP server): scenes and objects, grease pencil v3, meshes, materials and node trees, layered animation, modifiers and constraints, the video sequencer, the asset grab-bag, and Python escape hatches — all over SQL.
defaultPrompt: Start a BlenderSQL session and orient the .blend file.
Show me the scene hierarchy and the biggest datablocks.
Move 'Cube' to the origin and add a Subsurf modifier.
